title: Procedure: Using the densimeter
author: Lalo, Avar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Laboratory procedure used in this thesis to measure fluid density of model fluids with the densimeter. The document describes instrument preparation, verification with distilled water, sample injection, recording of density values, and cleaning after use. This procedure is part of the thesis  Experimental Investigation of Displacement Flow in Irregular Annuli . The work was carried out at the University of Stavanger (UiS).
